# Narrator Presence Implementation Report

## Audit Summary
Integrated against existing ENCS/EEGS/hook continuity, prose constraints, sequence architecture, scene generation runtime, authoritative cockpit, and regeneration loop orchestration.

## New Production Artifacts
- Narrator domain schemas and machine-usable pack contract
- Narrator presence derivation, convergence engine, era bridge service
- Hook continuity adapter, prose adapter, validation service
- Cockpit narrator summary extension
- Narrator system integration tests

## Existing Systems Reused
- ENCS hook continuity declarations and downstream bias channels
- Prose generation constraints and scene-level derivation path
- Author command cockpit bundle and service
- Book1 regeneration loop orchestration and cockpit assembly

## Integration Outcomes
- Narrator->ENCS/HCEL: hook declarations are narrator-augmented
- Narrator->Prose: chapter prose constraints are narrator-aware
- Narrator->Cockpit: narrator state visible in authoritative cockpit
- Narrator->Regeneration: narrator pack and validation executed in runtime loop

## Validation Outcomes
Validation now checks abrupt shifts, first-person readiness, cognition boundary risks, transition-anchor presence, and voice consistency drift.

## Deferred Items
- Scene text rendering does not yet emit narrator-aware prose directly from generated text templates.
- Additional narrator-driven literary-device gating can be expanded per scene role.
